task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the correct Asset record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CRM interface displays the details or edit page for the asset with Serial Number 'SN-US-2024-9981' (Sonosite Edge II).

task_completion.description: Verify the asset's status was changed to 'Out of Service'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Status' field on the asset record is set to 'Out of Service' and the changes are saved.

task_completion.description: Verify the HelpDesk ticket has the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket title field displays exactly 'Dead Transducer Probe' in the ticket creation or details screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the ticket priority and status are correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket 'Priority' field is set to 'High' and the 'Status' field is set to 'Open'.

task_completion.description: Verify the ticket is linked to the correct organization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Organization Name' or related organization field on the ticket shows 'Memorial Healthcare System'.

task_completion.description: Verify the ticket is linked to the correct asset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Asset Name' or related asset field on the ticket shows 'SN-US-2024-9981' or 'Sonosite Edge II'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the CRM.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible showing the CRM interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the data was entered into the actual CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are within the CRM's native forms and fields, not typed into a generic text editor, notepad, or search bar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually saved the ticket and asset changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: A success message, saved record view, or non-edit mode view of the updated asset and created ticket is visible in the screenshots, indicating the forms were submitted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected asset serial number is 'SN-US-2024-9981'. The asset status must be updated to 'Out of Service'. The new HelpDesk ticket must have the title 'Dead Transducer Probe', priority 'High', status 'Open', and be linked to the organization 'Memorial Healthcare System'.
